description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a landscaped plot with a hip roof and a mix of large and small windows. The exterior features a combination of light-colored siding and gray roofing, with a prominent chimney and a garage attached to the main structure. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck with lounge chairs, a small gazebo, and a garden area with trees and shrubs. The house has a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area adjacent to the pool, providing a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The front yard is neatly manicured with a driveway leading to the garage and a walkway to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, attached garage, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring a pool, gazebo, and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and manicured front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, chimney, and glass-enclosed sunroom, with a clear view of the backyard pool and gazebo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, wooden deck with lounge chairs, gazebo, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sunroom, pool, and garden, with the garage and driveway partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and direct walkway from the driveway, no porch or columns
